overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing Night City during golden hour. The character moves from a neon-lit commercial sidewalk with palm trees, across a bridge past an NCPD station, to a major intersection dominated by massive megabuildings labeled '06' and '07'.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signs and palm trees

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: moving along the commercial sidewalk past storefronts and palm trees, accelerating to a run while heading toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction
two people standing near the billboard at the end of the street

entered.detail: large billboard structure spanning the street with illuminated advertisements and neon lighting
tall palm trees lining the left side of the commercial street
low-rise commercial buildings with glowing neon signs and storefront facades
concrete pavement with scattered newspapers and manhole covers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit commercial street in Night City during golden hour. The camera follows the character walking past palm trees and neon-lit storefronts. The character breaks into a run at around 6 seconds, passing pedestrians while heading toward an intersection dominated by a large overhead billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated roadway with NCPD station overlook

events.description: character crosses from concrete sidewalk onto asphalt road and bridge walkway
black van drives past on the road from left to right

agents.ego_description: running across the street and continuing along the bridge walkway beside the NCPD police station

notable_agents.action: black van driving past on the road from left to right
person with red hair walking along the bridge railing

entered.detail: police station building with illuminated blue 'NCPD' signage and green neon text
massive concrete elevated highway ramps and support columns spanning across the view
tall cylindrical megabuilding with illuminated '06' marking on the facade
concrete and metal safety railing along the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto the asphalt road and bridge walkway. The NCPD station becomes visible on the right with its distinctive neon signage. A black van passes by on the road as the character runs along the bridge, with megabuilding 06 looming in the distance against the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with megabuildings and traffic infrastructure

events.description: character slows from running to walking and begins looking around the intersection
camera pans right to reveal megabuilding_07 and the full scale of the urban intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the large intersection and pausing to pan the camera around to view the surrounding megabuildings and cityscape

notable_agents.action: person in light colored shirt crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive rectangular megabuilding with '07' marking and industrial brutalist facade
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings and manhole covers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast urban intersection surrounded by massive megabuildings. The camera slows and pans to showcase the scale of megabuilding_06 and the newly visible megabuilding_07. Traffic lights and elevated highway ramps frame the scene as the character explores the area, with the warm golden hour light casting long shadows across the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit commercial district that gradually expands into a vast urban intersection dominated by monolithic architecture. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon storefronts, where the camera tracks a character who breaks into a run toward a large overhead billboard. As the character transitions from the pavement onto a bridge walkway, the scene opens up to reveal an NCPD station with glowing signage and a black van passing by, while megabuilding 06 begins to loom against the setting sun. The movement then flows into a massive intersection, where the camera slows and pans to showcase the overwhelming scale of megabuildings 06 and 07. Finally, the view encompasses elevated highway ramps and traffic lights, with the warm golden hour light casting long shadows across the asphalt.
